package.name: franka_handeye_calibration
package.description: Eye-to-hand calibration for Franka Panda with Intel RealSense D435i. Provides URDF (Panda + camera at guess pose) and a single launch that brings up franka_control, MoveIt (panda_moveit_config) and the RealSense node ready for the moveit_calibration RViz panel.
package.author: Do Won Park
